lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਭਇਆ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur naanak jaa kau bheaa deaalaa |
lines.english: That humble being, O Nanak, unto whom the Guru grants His Mercy,
Is forever enraptured. ||4||6||100||
The long-lived one has been born to this destiny.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
He came to acquire a home in the womb,
The True Guru has truly given a child.
and his mother's heart is so very glad. ||1||
A son is born - a devotee of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟਿਆ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਧੁਰ ਕਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pragattiaa sabh meh likhiaa dhur kaa | rahaau |
lines.english: This pre-ordained destiny has been revealed to all. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸੀ ਮਾਸੀ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਬਾਲਕ ਜਨਮੁ ਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: dasee maasee hukam baalak janam leea |
lines.english: In the tenth month, by the Lord's Order, the baby has been born.
Sorrow is dispelled, and great joy has ensued.
The companions blissfully sing the songs of the Guru's Bani.
The vine has grown, and shall last for many generations.
This is pleasing to the Lord Master. ||2||
That which my mind wishes for, the True Guru has granted.
The Power of the Dharma has been firmly established by the Lord.
I have become carefree, and I fix my attention on the One Lord. ||3||
I speak as it pleases the Guru to have me speak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਬਾਲਕੁ ਪਿਤਾ ਊਪਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਬਹੁ ਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jiau baalak pitaa aoopar kare bahu maan |
lines.english: As the child places so much faith in his father,
This is not a hidden secret;
Guru Nanak, greatly pleased, has bestowed this gift. ||4||7||101||
Giving His Hand, the Perfect Guru has protected the child.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਪਹਿ ਪਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeea kee aradaas guroo peh paaee | rahaau |
lines.english: I offer my heart-felt prayer to the Guru, and it is answered. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਜਪੀ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਧਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur gur japee guroo gur dhiaaee |
lines.english: I contemplate the Guru, the Guru; I meditate on the Guru, the Guru.
The glory of His servant has become manifest. ||1||
I have taken to the Sanctuary of the True Divine Guru.
He has preserved my soul, body, youth and breath of life.
The service of His servant has been fulfilled. ||2||
Says Nanak, I am a sacrifice to the Guru. ||3||8||102||
Aasaa, Eighth House, Kaafee, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣੁ ਨਿਮਾਣੇ ਤੂੰ ਧਣੀ ਤੇਰਾ ਭਰਵਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: maan nimaane toon dhanee teraa bharavaasaa |
lines.english: You are the honor of the dishonored. O Master, in You I place my trust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੈ ਤੇਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh tis daa sabh kichh hai teraa |1|
lines.english: My soul and body, and all of this, everything is Yours. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਬੰਦਾ ਬੈ ਖਰੀਦੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: mai bandaa bai khareed sach saahib meraa |
lines.english: I am Your purchased slave, O True Lord Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਚੇ ਅਨ ਟੇਕ ਹੈ ਸੋ ਜਾਣਹੁ ਕਾਚਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin saache an ttek hai so jaanahu kaachaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the True One, any other support is false - know this well. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਅਪਾਰ ਹੈ ਕੋਈ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: teraa hukam apaar hai koee ant na paae |
lines.english: Your Command is infinite; no one can find its limit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਸੀ ਸੋ ਚਲੈ ਰਜਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis gur pooraa bhettasee so chalai rajaae |2|
lines.english: One who meets with the Perfect Guru, walks in the Way of the Lord's Will. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ਸਿਆਣਪਾ ਕਿਤੈ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: chaturaaee siaanapaa kitai kaam na aaeeai |
lines.english: Cunning and cleverness are of no use.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਲਖ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਈਅਹਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਵੈ ਨ ਬੰਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: je lakh karam kamaaeeeh kichh pavai na bandhaa |
lines.english: One may perform tens of thousands of actions, but attachment to things is not satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਠਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਜੋ ਦੇਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tutthaa saahib jo devai soee sukh paaeeai |3|
lines.english: That which the Lord Master gives, by the Pleasure of His Will - that is pleasing to me. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀਤਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਰ ਹੋਰੁ ਛੋਡਿਆ ਧੰਧਾ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੦੩॥
lines.translit: jan naanak keetaa naam dhar hor chhoddiaa dhandhaa |4|1|103|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has made the Naam his Support. He has renounced other entanglements. ||4||1||103||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਾ ਮੈ ਭਾਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sarab sukhaa mai bhaaliaa har jevadd na koee |
lines.english: I have pursued all pleasures, but none is as great as the Lord.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਰਉ ਇਕੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਚਸਾ ਇਹੁ ਕੀਜੈ ਦਾਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam na visrau ik khin chasaa ihu keejai daanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Please, grant me this one blessing, that I may never, even for an instant, forget Your Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਸਦ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: balihaaree gur aapane sad sad kurabaanaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Guru; I am forever and ever a sacrifice to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੁਠੇ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur tutthe te paaeeai sach saahib soee |1|
lines.english: By the Pleasure of the Guru's Will, the True Lord Master is obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਗਠੁ ਸਚਾ ਸੋਇ ਹੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhaagatth sachaa soe hai jis har dhan antar |
lines.english: How very fortunate are those who have the wealth of the Lord deep within the heart.
